description: Bobbi manages to kill General Androvich, which dissipates the shadow and saves the Prime Minister. The victory is short-lived as Russian soldiers immediately arrest Bobbi and Hunter, setting the stage for their impending separation from S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: Yeah, I know. Me, too. I don't know what frightened me more, the firing squad or that shadow muppet.
I was lucky. You were good. I bet you could do with a cheeseburger right now, huh?
There's no cheeseburgers where we're going.
If there's a way out of this, I can't see it. Not where everyone wins.
